overall.description: Game engine footage depicting a first-person walk along a sunny coastal beach lined with modern stilt houses. The camera moves steadily along the sand, passing multi-story beachfront properties and approaching pedestrians near the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with stilted beachfront properties

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach past multi-story grey stilt apartments

entered.detail: three-story grey beach house elevated on wooden stilts with multiple balconies
dark-colored multi-story beach house with lattice railings on stilts
tall palm tree rising behind the beach houses
distinctive orange two-story house on stilts visible in the distance
external wooden staircase leading up to the grey apartment building
large boulders scattered across the sandy beach

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a sunny beach, passing modern grey stilt houses on the left. The camera moves steadily forward, revealing wooden stairs and beach rocks scattered on the sand, with a palm tree and distant orange house visible against the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach shoreline with ocean view

events.description: camera turns left to reveal open ocean view as buildings move to the right side of frame

agents.ego_description: turning toward the ocean while continuing to walk along the shoreline, taking in the coastal view

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water stretching to the horizon with gentle waves
clumps of dry beach grass growing in the sand

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to showcase the open ocean view while continuing along the beach. The dark stilt house moves to the right foreground as the grey apartment building exits the frame. Dry grass and scattered rocks dot the sandy shore, with the distant coastline visible under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach approach to orange stilt house

events.description: camera adjusts path to approach the orange beach house directly

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distinctive orange stilt house along the sandy shoreline

entered.detail: white picket fence surrounding the base of the orange house
large white satellite dish mounted on the house deck
white painted wooden staircase leading up to the main deck

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the distinctive orange stilt house that was previously visible in the distance. The ocean moves out of direct view as the focus shifts to the house details, including a white fence, satellite dish, and external stairs. The beach remains sandy with sparse vegetation.

events.description: camera passes underneath the orange house structure, temporarily obscuring the sky
exiting the covered area under the house back into open beach

agents.ego_description: walking under the stilt house structure and passing two pedestrians standing on the sand

notable_agents.action: two people standing and conversing under the house structure, one wearing a red shirt

entered.detail: wooden support beams and underside of the elevated orange house creating shade
reddish-orange multi-story building visible in the background on the hillside
utility poles and power lines running along the hillside

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes directly under the orange stilt house, where two pedestrians are standing and conversing on the sand. The lighting becomes diffused under the structure's shade. After passing the pedestrians, the camera emerges back into sunlight, revealing a red building and power lines on the hillside ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a sunny beach, transitioning from a walk past grey modern villas toward a closer encounter with a vibrant orange stilt house. It begins by moving steadily forward past grey stilt houses and wooden stairs, with scattered rocks and a distant orange building visible under a clear blue sky. As the camera turns left to showcase the open ocean and the distant coastline, the grey structures recede to make way for dry grass and sandy shores. The focus then shifts back toward the land, approaching the orange house to reveal details like a white fence and satellite dish before the camera glides directly beneath the structure. Finally, the lighting softens in the shade where two pedestrians stand conversing, before the camera emerges back into the bright sunlight to reveal a red building and power lines on the hillside ahead.
